query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `ai_constitutions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `company_name` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `company_description` text,
  `industry` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `company_size` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `website` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `icp_industries` text,
  `icp_company_size` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `icp_seniority` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `icp_geography` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `icp_pain_points` text,
  `icp_buying_triggers` text,
  `unique_value_prop` text,
  `top_competitors` text,
  `differentiators` text,
  `communication_tone` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'professional',
  `language_style` varchar(64) DEFAULT 'direct',
  `forbidden_words` text,
  `primary_goal` varchar(128) DEFAULT 'generate_leads',
  `monthly_lead_target` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `avg_deal_value` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `sales_cycle_length` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `custom_context` text,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `ai_constitutions_user_id_unique` (`user_id`)
);
